DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-16-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MATTHEW HUEY'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. (SEE-MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT SBORROWMAN@GMAIL.COM. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Nov-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MATTHEW HUEY's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Discovery Responses.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Complete responses, without objections, due to be served by December 3, 2021.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at sborrowman@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
